method: Inject high-variance noise (std=20) to simulate noisy baseline (e.g., unpredictable traffic); detector = EWMA control chart (alpha=0.3, K=4.0) over de-seasonalised residuals, as in app/engine.py.
conclusion: The EWMA K=4.0 control limit remains robust with <1% FP even under severe Gaussian noise. However, structural shifts (like a prolonged Flash Sale) will trigger alerts. ADR recommendation: Allow manual 'Silence & Retrain' during known business events.
